title: Electronic Invoicing API
description: High-performance API that processes more than 15,000 invoice document requests. Handles bulk file reception, storage, and processing with complex validations and full traceability.

title: Internal Management Portal
description: Corporate web platform with +70 modules that optimize internal processes for a company with +700 employees. Includes HR modules, executive reports, shift management, and more.

title: Executive Reporting System
description: Executive dashboard with KPI visualization, business metrics, and automated reports for management decision-making. Oracle integration and PDF/Excel report generation.
